subcodes.first_line: O my Lord and my Hope! This is Thy servant, who hath bowed himself before the King of Thy oneness in humility, and hath submitted himself in lowliness before the presence of Thy singleness, and hath believed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی هذا عبدک الذی خضع لملیک سلطان احدیتک و خشع لحضره وحدانیتک و آمن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
